seo.title: Tax Prep Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your tax preparation business. Route upset clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Tax Preparation
hero.subheading: Seasonal rushes end in refunds or bills. ReviewFlo asks after filing when clients still understand the outcome.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Tax Preparer Faces

items.heading: Relief or shock, then silence
items.body: Clients vanish after April whether they owe or get money back.

items.heading: Refund delays feel personal
items.body: IRS timelines become your fault online.

items.heading: Privacy limits what you can celebrate publicly

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Tax Preparers

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after signature
items.body: Ask when the return is filed and emotions are still fresh.

items.heading: Private first for fee or mistake disputes
Seasonal offices
items.body: Simple tools that fit pop-up shops.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we ask without sharing client data?
items.a: Yes. Public asks should focus on responsiveness and clarity, not numbers.
Private feedback lets you walk through next steps before a public rant.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Email the link after secure delivery of the return.
Keep reviews about communication, not outcomes you cannot promise.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Tax Prep Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
